title: Other health coverage for 2020
meta-description: Get 2020 federal tax info for Medicare, Medicaid, Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), other coverage. Form 1095-B, 1095-C, more.
title-short: If you had other health coverage in 2020
excerpt: Get 2020 federal tax info for Medicare, Medicaid, Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), other coverage. Form 1095-B, 1095-C, more.
content:
If you had coverage through Medicare, Medicaid, the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP), or another source, depending on the coverage you had, you may get Form 1095-B, Health Coverage, to help you complete your taxes.

If you got a Form 1095-B

Read Parts III and IV to find information about:

  • Your 2020 insurance coverage
  • Covered individuals and the months they had coverage

Tax forms and instructions:

  • Form 1040, U.S. Individual Income Tax Return (PDF, 147 KB) and Form 1040 instructions (PDF, 4.1 MB)
  • Questions and answers about Forms 1095-B or 1095-C from the IRS

More than one coverage status?

If you were enrolled in other health coverage for only part of 2020, or other household members had different coverage, visit these pages for enrollment in:

  • Marketplace plan WITH premium tax credits
  • Marketplace plan WITHOUT premium tax credits
  • Job-based coverage
  • Not having coverage
